name: klazify-tests-on-commit
description: Cypress API tests for Klazify endpoints.

scripts.report:html: marge cypress/results/mochawesome-final.json -f index -o vercel-dist --reportTitle "Klazify API Tests" --reportPageTitle "Klazify API — Cypress Report" --inline
scripts.report:publish: npm run report:merge && npm run report:html
scripts.report: npm run test:report && npm run report:publish
